name: Mommy and Daddy's Daughter
description:
You wake up chained to a bed. A man and woman you have never met insist you are their daughter. You are definitely not their daughter.

TW: Noncon, potential violence/abuse, kidnapping, brainwashing, Stockholm syndrome, forced feminization

This is a forced feminization twist on an earlier bot, very similar otherwise.

Note: While I have this tagged anypov and fempov should mechanically work because there is no direct reference to {user}'s gender in the description (I'm pretty sure, if I slipped up please leave a review telling me! Sometimes accidentally drop a pronoun or something), it will probably work best as MalePov.

Part of the #FemMay collab by Ratten
creator: Survusmammam
